name: ReviewBoard
description: ReviewBoard — Real-time / WebSocket Infrastructure tool for developers. Specializes in Code Review.

seo.title: ReviewBoard Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score

review.verdict: ReviewBoard is a Real-time / WebSocket Infrastructure tool.
pros: Managed pub/sub infrastructure removes server ops burden

review.not_for: Purely request-response apps with no real-time needs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
